title: iFrame Form Height Adjustment
excerpt: When embedding a Monday form into our website, it shows up as an iFrame. This iframe can be set to a specific height. After the form is filled out the height of the iframe stays the same, yet the form is mush shorter, wh…

posts.author: Skyoso (Richard)
posts.cookedHtml:
When embedding a Monday form into our website, it shows up as an iFrame. This iframe can be set to a specific height. After the form is filled out the height of the iframe stays the same, yet the form is mush shorter, which is confusing.

When embedding an iframe from a service such as Pardot, I was able to add javascript to the iframe that passed height information to the website that ebedded the iframe. Then there can be listening javascript that listens for that height information and adjusts the iframe real time as the height changes. Can this be setup for Monday?

a potential solution is explained here:
https://jacobfilipp.com/iframe-height-autoresize-crossdomain/

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Skyoso and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Would you be able to provide some screen recording or screenshots of the issue?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias
